question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest number of stroke deaths in the United States? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A public health analyst wants to identify the lowest mid-2000s year for stroke deaths nationwide.

1.fact: For State = "United States" and Cause Name = "Stroke", the lowest total deaths in 2005-2010 occurs in 2009 with 128842.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest number of stroke deaths in the United States? (Filter State == "United States" and Cause Name == "Stroke"; sum Deaths by Year; select the minimum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Filter to U.S. stroke deaths, sum by Year (2005-2010), and select the minimum; the lowest year is 2009.
